title: Enable custom cover photos for work docs
excerpt: It would be great if you could also use your own photos as “cover photos”. Just like it is already possible in the workspace area. We use work docs in client projects and this would give an even more professional appeara…

posts.author: kai.sonnet (Kai Sonnet)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if you could also use your own photos as “cover photos”. Just like it is already possible in the workspace area. We use work docs in client projects and this would give an even more professional appearance.

posts.author: EricDuncan (Eric Kozak)
posts.cookedHtml: We just discovered this limitation. A ridiculous limitation.

posts.author: EricDuncan (Eric Kozak)
posts.cookedHtml:
There is this existing thread about the same thing with 13 upvotes. Maybe go and upvote this as well?

Work Doc Image Header: Should be able to customize with images from account library Feature requests
[Work Doc Header Image2] Should be able to attach company images for a work doc header. The images provided are not relevant to my team.

posts.author: KS-GBX (Kanishk Srivastava)
posts.cookedHtml:
Allow users to upload customer Cover Photo in the Doc Header.

Currently only monday.com and Unsplash.com options are available.
